incentive.statement: Source selection must expose canonical lexical stems with exact boundaries and quantity without allowing formula strings or picker metadata to decide grammar.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate source evidence, UI transition, runtime delivery, and focused verification without broadening picker records into grammar authority.

outcome: VNC and NNC Source offer stem-only canonical citations while direct entry and typed Authority decisions remain intact.

responsibilities.statement: Represent canonical source stems, lexical notation, valence display class, evidence section, and quantity adjudication outside the renderer.

actors.contribution: Provide a frozen non-authorizing inventory and reject formula-shaped or quantity-conflicted records.

responsibilities.statement: Expose the inventory in Source and commit a chosen lexical stem through the existing source-parts transition.

actors.contribution: Render stem-only choices and keep all grammar controls in Authority.

responsibilities.statement: Install the source inventory through the single canonical ESM runtime.

actors.contribution: Add the inventory installer without creating a second runtime lane.

responsibilities.statement: Prove lexical-only notation, exact quantity, source selection, direct-entry survival, runtime coverage, and live behavior.

actors.contribution: Add focused inventory and UI transition checks plus browser evidence.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded target and closure evidence without starting full readiness.

actors.contribution: Keep the picker separate from formula and generation authority.

support.triggeringFinding: The alignment gate identified both source inventory record kinds as undeclared contracts.
support.contribution: Register and validate the non-authorizing record and audit boundaries.
support.alignmentEvidence: audit:alignment returns the unregistered-classical-contracts metric to its stabilization baseline.
support.returnCondition: Both contracts are registered and focused verification passes.

retirements.removalEvidence: The core audit rejects formula-shaped citations, both Source pickers display stem-only labels, and fresh-origin browser proof found no formula-shaped option.

evidence.result: Main UI and causative relation UI passed 396/396 assertions, including inventory counts, schematic-slot exclusion, notation, quantity adjudication, contracts, UI wiring, and direct entry.
One modern browser entry exposes 75 modules and 75 installers.
VNC exposed 160 stem choices and NNC exposed 39; selecting each updated only Source, direct NNC entry remained available, and the browser emitted no warning/error logs.
Renderer construction remained 38 and unregistered Classical contracts returned to the baseline of 200.

closure.nextLessonEntryPoint: Select the next explicit implementation target; full readiness remains a formal handoff gate.
